record.field:
if record: base_url = env['ir.config_parameter'].get_param('web.base.url') or '' model = record._name link = '%s/web#id=%s&model=%s&view_type=form' % (base_url, record.id, model) record.message_post( body = "Se ha creado la solicitud %s por %s el %s.
Ver Solicitud" % ( record.name, record.create_uid.name, record.request_date or 'sin fecha', link ), subtype='mail.mt_comment' )
